---
title: "Educación en Diabetes, una urgente necesidad en Latinoamérica"
subtitle: "Education in diabetes. An urgent need in Latin America"
author: "Mgs. Ana Fernada Sánchez Encalada"
date: "2026-09-23"
---

[Publicidad/advertisement](2026-09-23.pdf)

[Registrate aquí/register
here](https://aarhusuniversity.zoom.us/meeting/register/OlvpMMO4RIqMzQqpMAPU0g)
